raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Adonijus dsirdeja to
ar wiﬀeem Aizinateem/ kas pee
winna bija/ un tee jaw bij beigun-
schi ehſt. Un Joabs dsirdeja ar-
ridsan tahs Trummetes Skan-
nu/ un fazzija: Kas ta tahda
Skanna un Trohkfuis Pilsfahta?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tas wehl runnaja/
rangi/ tad nahze Jonatans ta
Preestera Abjatara Dehls. Un
Adonjus fazzija: Nahz eekscha/
jo tu effi gohdigs Wihrs/ un
neffisi labbas Webstis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jonatans atbildeja/
un fazzija us Adoniju: Gann/
bet muhsu Kungs tas Kehnisch
Dahwids irr Salamanu par
Kehninu darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniisch irr to
Preesteri Zadafu/ un to Pra wee-
tu Nahtanu/ un Benaju Joja-
da Dehlu/ un tohs Kreett un
Pleett ar winnu fuhtijs/ un tee
ter winnu likkuschi us ta Kehnina
Stig-Ehseta-Mahtes jaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Preesteris Zadafs/
un tas Praweets Nahtans irr
to par Kehninu fiwaidifschi Gio-
nā/ un irr preezigi no turrence
angscham nahkuschi/ kat as Pils-
fakts riheht rihb/ fchi irr ta
Skanna/ ko juhs effat dsirdejtchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 46,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir Salamans fehsch us
tahs Walstitbas Krehsfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 47,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir ta Kehnixa Kalpi irr
nahkuschi muhfam Kungam tam
Kehnimam Dahwidam Labbu
wehleht/ fazzidami: Lai taws
"
    },
    {
      "n": 48,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch irr ar-
ridsan ta fazzijis: Slawehts irr
tas KUNGS Israeta Deews/
kas schodeen weenu irr dewis us
mannu Gohda-Krehftu fehdcht/
ka mannas Azzis to redsejchas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 49,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad istruhzinajahs un
zehlahs wiſt tee Aizinatec/ kas
pee Adoniju bija/ un gabje ttkatrs
fawu Zeltu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 50,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Adonijus bibjajahs
preeksch Salamanu/un zehlehs/
un fatwehre ta Altara Raggus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 51,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Salamanain tappa
fluddinahts un fazzihfs: Reds/
Adonjus bibstahs preeksch ta
Kehnina Salamana/ un rangi/
winsch irr ta Altara Raggus fat-
twehris/ un fakka: Lai tas Keh-
atsch Salamans man schodeen
swehre/ ka winsch fawn Kalpu
ar Sohbimu ne nokaus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 52,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Salamans:
Buhs winsch gohdigs Wihrs/
tad ne weens no winna Matteem
pee Semmeskritths/ bet ja Lau-
nume pee winna atrohdahs/tad
buhs tait nouirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 53,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehntasch Sala-
mans nosuhhtja turp/ un tikke to
no ta Altara nowest. Un tas
nahze/ un paktanntjahs preeksch
to Kehninu Salamann. Bet
Sala-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
